step_rationale: Antithrombotic lipid metabolite; directly inhibits platelet activation.
mechanism: 12-HETrE is a lipid metabolite that suppresses platelet adhesion and activation in response to vessel injury.

references.title: Platelet ACKR3/CXCR7 favors antiplatelet lipids over an atherothrombotic lipidome and regulates thromboinflammation.
